name: Creamy Baked Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle Creamy Chocolate Sweetened Condensed Milk (14-oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted margarine in a bowl. Press the mixture firmly onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a mixer bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually add the Eagle Creamy Chocolate Sweetened Condensed Milk until smooth.
4. Add the eggs and cornstarch to the mixture; mix well.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 55 minutes or until the center is set.
7. Cool and chill. Refrigerate leftovers.
